revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{pd|}}}|no||{{#if:{{{sentence|}}}{{{inline|}}}|{{source-attribution|sentence=y}}|{{source-attribution}}}} }}{{#invoke:template wrapper|wrap |_template=cite encyclopedia |_exclude=abbr, country, pd, section, sentence, inline, |at={{{section|}}} |url={{#if:{{{abbr|}}}|http://hdl.loc.gov/loc.gdc/cntrystd.{{{abbr}}} |https://www.loc.gov/collections/country-studies/about-this-collection/}} |title={{#if:{{{country|}}}|{{{country}}}: A Country Study|Country Studies}} |publisher=[[Federal Research Division]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_study here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_study for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#ifeq:{{{pd|}}}|no||{{#if:{{{sentence|}}}{{{inline|}}}|{{source-attribution|sentence=y}}|{{source-attribution}}}} }}{{#invoke:template wrapper|wrap
|_template=cite encyclopedia
|_exclude=abbr, country, pd, section, sentence, inline, 
|at={{{section|}}}
|url={{#if:{{{abbr|}}}|http://hdl.loc.gov/loc.gdc/cntrystd.{{{abbr}}} |https://www.loc.gov/collections/country-studies/about-this-collection/}}
|title={{#if:{{{country|}}}|{{{country}}}: A Country Study|Country Studies}}
|publisher=[[Federal Research Division]]
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
